short_description: The model reproduces the time profile of species depicted in Figure 12a and 12 b. The authors communicated to the curator that there is a typo in the paper,  the values of kd1 and kd2 are reversed. Model successfully reproduced using MathSBML.
short_description_original: The model reproduces the time profile of species depicted in Figure 12a and 12 b. The authors communicated to the curator that there is a typo in the paper, the values of kd1 and kd2 are reversed. Model successfully reproduced using MathSBML.
related_publication_name: A minimal mathematical model combining several regulatory cycles from the budding yeast cell cycle.
related_publication_original: A minimal mathematical model combining several regulatory cycles from the budding yeast cell cycle.
